creator: ykasap@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #18)
> That's not universally agreed yet.  There's no proper way to deal with files
> that have multiple patches from multiple sets, so don't do that.  There are
> some like that but in general no, one file per patch.

Oh, okay.  Understood.

I uploaded new patch v4.  In addition to 9.3R and 10.0R, 
I tried testport on 8.4R and it seemed ok.

Thank you very much for your kind guidance. Please let me know
if something is still wrong.
